Name: Meadow Endpoints
Tagline: Automatic RESTful CRUD endpoint generation from Meadow entities with behavior injection hooks

			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#2b55e2"/>

					<rect x="28.5" y="19.5" width="48" height="48" rx="8" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">ME</text>
	</svg>
